title: acrotrema uniflorum var. sylvaticum
intro: Acrotrema uniflorum var. sylvaticum, also known as the forest Acrotrema, is a plant species that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Acrotrema uniflorum var. sylvaticum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
